title: Diagnostic synthesis after biopsies
scenarioBrief: Hospital day 8 (2027-03-22). Muscle biopsy, skin biopsy, swallow study, and additional serologies are back. The chart now includes 7 days of progress notes, consult notes from rheum, GI, nutrition, derm, and ID. You're being asked to commit to a unifying diagnosis and explain the causal chain. AI assistant available.

chartGate._notes: AP4 visibility: everything through hospital day 8 — includes biopsy results, consult notes, daily labs trending. The final discharge note + 2027-03-25+ longitudinal data is NOT yet visible.

prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking the resident to commit to a unifying diagnosis and lay out the causal chain explicitly (e.g., SLE → myositis → dysphagia → starvation → kwashiorkor).

essential: TODO: essential elements (active SLE, inflammatory myositis component, oropharyngeal dysphagia mechanism, kwashiorkor from starvation, explicit causal chain)
bonus: TODO: bonus (recognizing why earlier presentations were missed, social-determinant amplifiers, prognosis framing)
redFlags: TODO: red flags (still splitting into unrelated diagnoses, missing the malnutrition link, attributing rash purely to SLE without considering kwashiorkor dermatosis)

prompts._aiPromptToGenerate: TODO — Phase 2: write the system prompt to generate an AI response that gets SLE + myositis right but completely misses the kwashiorkor/starvation chain, treating malnutrition as 'secondary' rather than causal.
prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking the resident to evaluate whether the AI's unifying explanation actually unifies — and what it misses.

shouldIdentify: TODO: items to flag (AI missed causal direction, treats malnutrition as bystander, doesn't explain skin findings as kwashiorkor dermatosis)
shouldNotEcho: TODO: not to parrot (the incomplete causal model, the framing of malnutrition as secondary)

prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking what specific chart elements (biopsy text, swallow study, lab trends) the resident chose to give the AI to build the unifying diagnosis, and what they deliberately withheld.

essential: TODO: essential (biopsy text, swallow study finding, albumin/prealbumin trend, weight trajectory)
bonus: TODO: bonus (deliberate withholding of distractors, structured framing of the question to the AI)
redFlags: TODO: red flags (raw consult-note dumping, no curation of competing diagnoses, leading the AI to the answer rather than letting it reason)
